Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Stormcallers]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Stormcallers use scripts that crackle with lightning in their arms.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Stormcallers are a cult of the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Stormcallers are present in the area.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Stormcallers have a sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Stormcallers are a group/cult.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — The Stormcallers follow the Dreadgod and use its divine techniques to steal madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Stormcallers are a group that includes Calan Archer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Stormcallers are associated with a Dreadgod cult.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Stormcallers use lightning dragons that can carry madra back to a user.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — The Stormcallers travel on a long storm cloud that produces rain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — The Stormcallers are one of the groups surrounding the valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Stormcallers have one Sage but no Herald.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Stormcallers tore down the Dawnwing sect's defenses.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The Stormcallers are held to the south by a serpentine raincloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Stormcallers are a group that was being cut off by Eithan.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — The Stormcallers may be with the Weeping Dragon.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — The Stormcallers call Kahn Mala 'Daughter of Dread'.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
